meaning: n.驾车,驱动器,快车道,推进力,驱使,动力,干劲,击球vt.开车,驱赶,推动、发动(机器等),驾驶(马车,汽车等)vi.开车,猛击,飞跑n.[计]驱动器
examples: For much of the last decade Buick offered four different four-door, front-wheel-drive sedans with V6 engines.
Licensing rules should also be standardised, while the drink-drive limit should be lowered, it said.
